title: The Enthusiastic Elephant,
content:
The Enthusiastic Elephant,
    who ferried himself across the water with the
    Kitchen Poker and a New pair of Ear-rings.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Enthusiastic Elephant,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
